description_long: This is a modern, boxy house surrounded by lush landscaping, including dense trees and shrubs on all sides. The structure features a flat roof with multiple outdoor terraces and large, floor-to-ceiling windows that allow for ample natural light. The exterior is primarily finished in a sleek, dark material, likely concrete or painted stucco, with some metallic or glass accents. The house is elevated above ground level, accessible by a central staircase leading to a prominent entryway. The layout is open, with visible interior spaces such as living areas, bedrooms, and possibly a kitchen, all arranged in a single above-ground story. Outdoor seating areas and patios are integrated into the design, blending indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, dark exterior, and lush surrounding landscaping. Features open terraces, a central staircase, and integrated outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main staircase, entryway, and a large patio area surrounded by dense greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extensive use of glass, multiple terraces, and the open layout of interior spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the flat roof, back patio, and symmetrical landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, a side patio, and the integration of the house with the surrounding trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central staircase leading to a recessed entry door, no porch, minimal overhang, and clean modern lines
